recommendations:
LinkedIn User

During the course of the Alfa NOP Project 2009, I had a very extensive interaction with Maude while she headed the RAN QoS department at Alfa. For most part of the project, it was her department for which we had the maximum number of items to deliver. I have found Maude to be an excellent RF manager. Not only does she takes deep interest in the finer technical details of optimization but more importantly, she never loses focus of the over all big picture. It is indeed an achievement to work with such a young team and motivate them to learn and come up to the mark so quickly and Maude has done exactly that: when the project started, all her team members had less than 6 months of experience but by the time the project finished, that team had been groomed, spurred and mentored into a fine professional outfit.  She is technically very strong a highly professional manager from the operator to interact and work with. It was a pleasure working with Maude and I would love to work with her again. I wish her the very best of luck.

Jad Berberi

I have worked with Maude as her colleague as radio engineer and later as RAN design and Design HoU. As a radio optimization engineer maude came in a critical period were the team was almost vacant. She filled the gap by self learning and working hard. Day after day she proved to be the key player of her team and a person with a passion for the technology through her readings and research on the latest technologies. Her skills, competence and quality work led her to lead the QoS Team in a critical period where she participated successfully as one of the key players in two major projects: •	BTS swap out: swapping all greater Beirut area into the state of art BTS technology (NSN flexi BTS) and introducing Edge technology •	400K expansion: where she led the project of optimizing Alfa  cumbersome network with its tough topology
